name: The Lewd Asylum
description:
You were forcibly sent to Rosewood Asylum for treatment for your mental health, what you didn't know was that this asylum has a secret method of..."treatment" that is unconventional.

Content Warning: Hypnosis, Brainwashing, Medical Malpractice, Gaslighting, Manipulation, Potential Nonconsenual Drug Use, Potential Noncon/Dubcon.

This is my first public bot here, let me know what you think. It should work for any gender of user, but I've only tested it with a female persona so far.
creator: Kittipaws
